prompt: Order these chemical milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: The Sceptical Chymist
events.fact: 1661 — Robert Boyle separates chemistry from alchemy

events.title: Oxygen discovered
events.fact: 1774 — Priestley and Scheele isolate oxygen gas

events.title: First modern element list
events.fact: 1789 — Antoine Lavoisier defines element and names oxygen/hydrogen

events.title: Atomic Theory proposed
events.fact: 1803 — John Dalton explains elements combine by mass ratios

events.title: Periodic Table published
events.fact: 1869 — Dmitri Mendeleev organizes elements by properties

events.title: Marie Curie Chemistry Nobel
events.fact: 1911 — awarded for discovering radium and polonium

events.title: Buckyballs discovered
events.fact: 1985 — Kroto, Smalley, and Curl discover hollow carbon fullerenes
